report.summary: Audited 5 recently modified files for UX issues, fixed touch targets/responsive sizing/accessibility in WalletSecurityScoreCalculator, added retry button to TradingViewChart error state, improved LearnPage related article touch targets, and created 2 missing OG images for today's new learn guides.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: WalletSecurityScoreCalculator: Enlarged checkbox touch targets from 18x18 to 20x20 with 44px min-height rows for mobile tap reliability
WalletSecurityScoreCalculator: Added responsive font sizing — score number scales from 56px to 40px on mobile (≤480px) via CSS media query
WalletSecurityScoreCalculator: Added aria-labels to all checkboxes with label + point value context for screen readers
WalletSecurityScoreCalculator: Added aria-live='polite' to score display so screen readers announce score changes
WalletSecurityScoreCalculator: Added focus-visible outline (2px solid #6366f1) for keyboard navigation on checkboxes
WalletSecurityScoreCalculator: Made score display flex-wrap for graceful layout on narrow screens
TradingViewChart: Replaced plain text error fallback with retry button (44px min-height, branded indigo style) so users can recover from chart load failures
TradingViewChart: Enhanced aria-label to include chart interval context (daily/weekly/N-minute)
LearnPage: Increased related article card padding (p-4 → p-4 sm:p-5) with min-height 64px for better touch targets
LearnPage: Added 'block' display class to related article links for full-area tap targets

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: onchain-analytics-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — features on-chain chart with whale/smart money alert dots, volume bars, platform pills (Glassnode, Nansen, Dune, DefiLlama, Artemis), and key metrics (NVT Ratio, Exchange Net Flow, MVRV Z-Score)

OG image: crypto-arbitrage-strategies-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — features CEX vs DEX price spread visualization with arbitrage arrows, cumulative P&L chart, strategy type pills (CEX-DEX, Cross-Chain, Funding Rate, Delta Neutral), and stats (spread range, funding APR, success rate)

sections.title: UX Audit Summary
items: Audited 5 files: 2 new learn guide pages, WalletSecurityScoreCalculator, TradingViewChart, LearnPage component
Found 44 total issues across files: 5 critical, 17 high, 16 medium, 6 low priority
Most common patterns: missing mobile responsive breakpoints (5/5 files), insufficient touch targets (4/5), missing error handling/loading states (4/5), contrast/accessibility gaps (4/5)
Addressed highest-impact issues in 3 components; remaining issues (table horizontal scroll on learn pages, contrast on info boxes) are lower priority and tracked for next cycle
